hibernate-mapping.query: select u from User u where u.loginId = ?0
select u from User u where u.instanceId = ?0
select us from UserSecurity us where us.userId = ?0 and us.facility = ?1
hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
(select ur.userInstanceId AS userId, RTRIM(rs.facility) AS facility, rs.security_Id AS securityId from cabinet..users u join cabinet..user_role ur on u.UserInstanceId = ur.UserInstanceId join cabinet..role_security rs on ur.roleId = rs.roleId join cabinet..security_rights sr on rs.security_id = sr.security_Id where u.NAME = :userId and rs.roleId = (select RoleId from User_Role where userInstanceId = u.UserInstanceId) and rs.Facility = :facilityCode and sr.SECURITY_DESC = :securityDesc
EXCEPT
select us.user_Id AS userId, RTRIM(us.facility) AS facility , us.security_Id AS securityId from cabinet..users u join cabinet..user_security us on u.UserInstanceId = us.USER_ID join cabinet..security_rights sr on us.security_id = sr.security_Id where u.NAME = :userId and us.overrideAction = 0 and us.Facility = :facilityCode and sr.SECURITY_DESC = :securityDesc )
UNION select us.user_Id AS userId, RTRIM(us.facility) AS facility, us.security_Id AS securityId from cabinet..users u join cabinet..user_security us on u.UserInstanceId = us.USER_ID join cabinet..security_rights sr on us.security_id = sr.security_Id where u.NAME = :userId and us.overrideAction = 1 and us.Facility = :facilityCode and sr.SECURITY_DESC = :securityDesc

(select ur.userInstanceId AS userId, RTRIM(rs.facility) AS facility, rs.security_Id AS securityId from cabinet..users u join cabinet..user_role ur on u.UserInstanceId = ur.UserInstanceId join cabinet..role_security rs on ur.roleId = rs.roleId join cabinet..security_rights sr on rs.security_id = sr.security_Id where u.NAME = :userId and rs.roleId = (select RoleId from User_Role where userInstanceId = u.UserInstanceId) and rs.Facility = :facilityCode and sr.SECURITY_DESC in ('ROI Email', 'ROI Print/Fax', 'ROI Write To Disc')
EXCEPT
select us.user_Id AS userId, RTRIM(us.facility) AS facility , us.security_Id AS securityId from cabinet..users u join cabinet..user_security us on u.UserInstanceId = us.USER_ID join cabinet..security_rights sr on us.security_id = sr.security_Id where u.NAME = :userId and us.overrideAction = 0 and us.Facility = :facilityCode and sr.SECURITY_DESC in ('ROI Email', 'ROI Print/Fax', 'ROI Write To Disc') )
UNION select us.user_Id AS userId, RTRIM(us.facility) AS facility, us.security_Id AS securityId from cabinet..users u join cabinet..user_security us on u.UserInstanceId = us.USER_ID join cabinet..security_rights sr on us.security_id = sr.security_Id where u.NAME = :userId and us.overrideAction = 1 and us.Facility = :facilityCode and sr.SECURITY_DESC in ('ROI Email', 'ROI Print/Fax', 'ROI Write To Disc')
